claim: Nemotron models achieve 49B size via distillation from Llama 3.3 70B with reinforcement learning
actionable: Deploy Nemotron 49B for reasoning tasks needing 3x fewer parameters than 70B while maintaining quality

claim: Reasoning tokens toggle on/off via 'detailed thinking on/off' system prompt injection
actionable: Add 'detailed thinking off' to system prompt to suppress reasoning steps when speed matters

claim: Nvidia released 20M-sample reasoning training dataset from DeepSeek R1, Qwen, Llama with math/code/science splits
actionable: Fine-tune your own reasoning models using Nvidia's open dataset for domain-specific reasoning tasks

claim: Nemotron 8B inconsistently triggers reasoning vs consistently generates text-only answers
actionable: If using Nemotron 8B, test reasoning reliability on your task distribution before production deployment
